name: Aegean Sea Chowder (Psarosoupa Kakavia)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb White fish, cut into 2-inch pieces
2 lbs Canned peeled tomatoes, including liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fish and shellfish by cleaning and cutting into bite-size pieces.
2. Heat olive oil in a large pot.
3. Fry onions and garlic on medium heat for 5 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients, except seafood, to the pot and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover the pot.
6. Cook for one hour.
7. Add fish and octopus, then cook an additional 20 minutes.
8. Finally, add shellfish and simmer for 5 more minutes.
9. Serve hot with crusty bread and crisp salad.
